_note: 2026-07-23 batch (batch 3 of the seminaries/midrashot-only pass, following the user's 'try a few more' request after batches 2-3's near-zero yield). This round's productive thread was 'midrashot for pre-military/national-service preparation,' a distinct sub-category from the standard shana-aleph seminary model. Rejected this round: Midreshet Tachlit (Akko) -- real per a VIN news mention but no official website found; Bnos Malka Academy, Machon Ora, Yeshivat Maharat Beit Midrash, Ateret Seminary of Queens College -- all US-based or non-existent under the searched name; Simchat Shlomo (Nachlaot) -- appears to be a combined yeshiva/seminary but couldn't confirm a distinct women's-only program or admissions page.

seminaries_midrashot.name: Midreshet Adraba
seminaries_midrashot.description: A one-year midrasha for young women preparing for IDF or national service, combining religious development, personal growth, and self-discovery within a Religious Zionist/Modern Orthodox framework.
seminaries_midrashot.signupInstructions: Complete the registration form on the website.
seminaries_midrashot.adminNote: Explicitly aimed at American 12th-grade girls preparing for Israeli military/national service -- a distinct sub-category from the standard academic-year seminary model. Tagged 'Medium integration' rather than the Haredi-seminary pattern's 'Low integration', matching the two closest RZ/pre-military-adjacent siblings (Bnei Akiva Olamit: Shalem, Migdal Oz), both of which use Medium integration.

seminaries_midrashot.name: Midreshet Dorit (Lindenbaum Lod)
seminaries_midrashot.description: A division of Midreshet Lindenbaum in Lod (opened 2017, renamed Midreshet Dorit in 2025 following a major gift), combining intensive Torah study with weekly volunteer service and a focus on preparing women for meaningful IDF service.
seminaries_midrashot.signupInstructions: Contact the program via Ohr Torah Stone's website.
seminaries_midrashot.adminNote: Added 'Medium integration' to match the RZ/pre-military sibling pattern (Bnei Akiva Olamit: Shalem, Migdal Oz). A division of the already-listed 'Midreshet Lindenbaum' (main campus: Leib Yaffe 51, Jerusalem) but in a separate city (Lod) with a distinct pre-military/national-service focus and its own name since a 2025 rebrand -- flagging as related-but-distinct, same relationship as several Bnei David/Lindenbaum sub-programs already added in earlier batches. Signup/contact pages are hosted on ots.org.il, which returns HTTP 403 to bare curl/WebFetch requests without a browser user-agent but was confirmed live (HTTP 200) with one.

seminaries_midrashot.name: Midrasha at Bar-Ilan University
seminaries_midrashot.description: An intensive Torah-study track for women, layered on top of a full undergraduate or graduate course load at Bar-Ilan University, covering Talmud, Tanach, Halacha, and Jewish thought alongside regular academic study.
seminaries_midrashot.durationText: Runs alongside a multi-year Bar-Ilan degree
seminaries_midrashot.signupInstructions: Register via the online form linked from the program's website.
seminaries_midrashot.adminNote: Added 'Spiritual growth' -- its core content is intensive Torah study, matching every other Torah-study-focused entry regardless of duration/structure. STRUCTURALLY DIFFERENT from every other entry in this batch: this is not a standalone seminary a student attends directly -- it requires the student to already be enrolled full-time in a Bar-Ilan University degree program, with the Midrasha as a supplementary intensive Torah-study load on top. Same category of concern as the Reichman Argov Fellows Program (rejected in an earlier, unrelated research pass for the same reason) -- flagging clearly since the user may prefer to exclude programs that require pre-existing enrollment elsewhere as a prerequisite.
